Bash(cd "/c/Users/ayusi/Desktop/New folder/customer-master-ai" && python << 'EOF'
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from demo_db import get_connection

conn = get_connection\(\)
c = conn.cursor\(\)

# Find both Acme parties
parties = c.execute\(
    "SELECT party_id, party_name, status FROM hz_parties WHERE party_name LIKE '%Acme%' ORDER BY party_name"
\).fetchall\(\)

for party in parties:
    print\(f"ID: {party['party_id']}, Name: {party['party_name']}, Status: {party['status']}"\)

conn.close\(\)
EOF)
